description: Arduino CLI-based VS Code extension — compile, upload, serial monitor, board/library management
command.generateDebugConfig: Arduino: Generate Debug Config (디버그 설정 생성)
command.updateAll: Arduino: Update All Libraries and Boards (보드/라이브러리 모두 업데이트)
config.cliPath.description: Path to arduino-cli executable (use default if in PATH)
config.defaultBaudRate.description: Default baud rate for serial monitor
config.autoUpdate.description: Automatically check and update installed cores and libraries on extension startup
config.serialTimestamps.description: Prepend a [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.mmm] timestamp to each line received from the Serial Monitor.
config.serialHexView.description: Display Serial Monitor data in Hex view instead of UTF-8 text.
